title: SUSTAINABLE FAMILIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: BIRCH COMMUNITY SERVICES SUSTAINABLE FAMILIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial literacy courses. Program participants have access to an on site food pantry. Participating households are required to monthly complete a 2 hour volunteer shift. 17780 NE San Rafael Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Must meet all of the following requirements: -Someone in the household is working or actively looking for work -Able to volunteer and discuss finances -Someone in the household who is able to speak conversationally fluent English for program communications Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-6pm Email (541) 251-5431 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 251-5431 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: $100 per month. Payment accepted via cash, check, or debit card. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Ukranian AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Off I-84, NE 181st exit, in Gresham/NE Portland/Rockwood Services: Financial Literacy Training If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BIRCH COMMUNITY SERVICES
